challenge_summary: The cost estimate is structurally transparent with commendable MCP-verified vs. unverified split, but contains a material internal contradiction (€1,520-1,920 detailed total vs. €2,800-3,500 headline), at least two missing services (ACR, Defender for Cloud), a critically understated Azure Monitor budget that creates an active NEN 7510 compliance risk, and Azure OpenAI token volumes that appear 3-5x too low for production with 200 concurrent agents.
compact_for_parent: Pass 1 (comprehensive) | HIGH | 3 must_fix, 5 should_fix | Key: [Cost total discrepancy €880-1,580/mo unexplained]; [Azure Monitor 5 GB/day cap silently drops logs — NEN 7510 breach]; [ACR missing from estimate]

findings.title: Internal cost total contradicts headline: €880-1,580/month gap unexplained
findings.recommendation: Add a reconciliation/bridging table mapping baseline (€1,520-1,920) to production (€2,800-3,500) with itemized variable cost increases.

findings.title: Azure Monitor 5 GB/day cap will silence audit logs — NEN 7510 breach
findings.recommendation: Model realistic 50-150 GB/day for 25 hospitals. Use Log Analytics commitment tiers (100 GB/day). Budget likely €3,100-10,000/month — single largest cost driver.

findings.title: Azure Container Registry (ACR) missing — required for Container Apps
findings.recommendation: Add ACR Premium (~€100/month) + 6th private endpoint (~€3.74/month). Update PE count from 5 to 6.

findings.title: Defender for Cloud costs absent despite being required for NEN 7510
findings.recommendation: Add Defender for Cloud estimate: €100-200/month (Containers + Key Vault + Storage plans).

findings.title: Azure OpenAI token volume (500K in + 200K out/day) appears 3-5× understated
findings.recommendation: Document basis for token estimate. Add high-usage scenario at 3× and 5× volumes. Consider GPT-4o-mini for routing agents.

findings.title: USD/EUR currency conversion risk creates unquantified €75-150/month variance
findings.recommendation: Add FX sensitivity row to Cost Risk Indicators. Document conversion rate and date.

findings.title: Cosmos DB Serverless 5,000 RU/s cap not flagged as production risk
findings.recommendation: Model peak RU demand. Add cap risk to Cost Risk Indicators with autoscale fallback cost (+€24-240/mo).

findings.title: Dev environment 30% cost assumption ignores fixed VNet-integrated costs
findings.recommendation: Revise dev estimate to 50-65% of production (~€570-900/month) or document reduced APIM tier for dev.

findings.title: Azure OpenAI PTU analysis absent from savings opportunities
findings.recommendation: Add PTU commitment analysis for steady-state workload. Potential savings €50-200/month.

findings.title: Azure Private DNS Zone costs not included (~€3-5/month)
findings.recommendation: Add Private DNS Zones line item for 5-6 zones.

findings.title: 7-year storage growth trajectory not modeled beyond Month 12
findings.recommendation: Add Year 3 and Year 7 storage projections with lifecycle policy assumptions.

findings.title: No Azure Savings Plans analysis for Container Apps compute
findings.recommendation: Add savings plan option: ~€30-65/month savings with 1-year commitment.
